caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt with a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders sits in a studio setting. He wears a tall, grey, stylized wig and black headphones. In front of him is a professional black microphone. The background features walls decorated with various framed photos and hanging clothing. To the left and right of the man, on-screen graphics display a logo with a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and focused, slightly shifting his gaze and head position while maintaining a serious expression. He is the only person visible in the scene, and the environment remains static as the camera captures his subtle movements during the recording.
